name: Walnut Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree the tofu.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients except the stuffing to the food processor and process again.
3. Transfer the stuffing into a bowl and pour the tofu mixture over it. Mix well.
4. Form the mixture into 8 burger patties and place them on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Serve on a burger bun with your favorite condiments.
(These can also be formed into 24 meatballs and served with spaghetti sauce over pasta.)
